Andrew Griffith MP backs new law to open more Banking Hubs as high street branch closures continue

Wednesday, 29 April, 2026
photograph - Andrew Griffith MP visiting Midhurst’s Banking Hub located at The Grange Community and Leisure Centre. Andrew Griffith has co-sponsored a Bill in Parliament which would change the law to allow an expansion of Banking Hubs so consumers have better access to face-to-face banking services. The In-Person Banking Services Bill was introduced in Parliament on Wednesday 29 April 2026 by...
